_comment: Dustwind Plateaus - Levels 4–7. Mid-tier desert zone with Dustwalker faction, Djhanid tension, sandstorms, and tactical open terrain.
biome: vast golden dunes, caravan wrecks, rocky outcrops, nomadic trade routes

signature_features.caravan_wrecks: Lootable wrecks scattered across dunes, often ambushed.
signature_features.djhanid_trading_posts: Neutral safe spots with limited merchants.
signature_features.wind_anchor_camps: Djhanid semi-buried shelters offering temporary refuge.
signature_features.dustwalker_patrol_routes: Visible paths in sand; patrols follow predictable loops.
signature_features.spider_nests: Rocky outcrops with web traps and ambush spiders.

dustwalkers.description: Fallen Djhanid marauders who raid caravans and ambush travelers.
special_rules: use whistles to alert nearby patrols

djhanid_nomads.description: Nomadic desert travelers who oppose the Dustwalkers.
djhanid_nomads.notes: Killing Djhanid decreases good faction and increases evil faction.

sunmaddened_wanderers.description: Exiles driven mad by the desert heat.

story_seeds: Caravan’s Plight – protect merchants from Dustwalker ambushes.
Madness of the Dunes – moral choice involving Sunmaddened exiles.
Investigate Dustwalker raids and Sandveil Order corruption.
Spider nest clearing for safe passage.
